name: Simply Baatein With Raveena
overview: Simply Baatien With Raveena is an interactive talk/chat show produced by Urban Brew Studios and hosted by Raveena Tandon. The show started airing on 7 September 2014 on Sony Pal. Raveena interacts with celebrities to discuss topics relating to womanhood

trailers.title: Simply Baatien With Raveena - Episode 1 - 7th September 2014
